About Me

Hi, I'm Niks! I've been obsessed with code since I was a kid, and I've spent the last 10 years turning that passion into a career. I'm a specialist in desktop development and backend setup, with a proven track record of delivering end-to-end software solutions. My background spans multiple platforms, from native Android apps to complex desktop environments.

Currently working at home, I focus on efficient systems and solving the unique challenges that come with desktop software. When I'm not coding, you can find me reading about the latest tech trends, or just chilling with some good music.

Full Name John Nichols Ranara
Nickname Niks, Banikaz, 0xb01
Based in Tacloban City, Leyte
Current Focus Software, Backend, (Learning) Japanese
Hobby Reading, Learning New Stuff
Spoken English, Filipino (Tagalog, Cebuano, Waray)
Operating Systems & Flavors
Programming & Technologies

Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
